creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #2)
> I think you can ignore the warning. Keep INSTALL_ICONS=yes in the Makefile.
Yes, this is what attachment #190439 proposes, i.e. doesn't remove INSTALLS_ICONS=yes. I just wanted to write some explanation in comment #1, in case if committer thinks otherwise.

Thanks for attention.
